name: Bar-b-Barn Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Place ribs in a pan (not stacked).
2. Pour the sauce (very thick) over the ribs.
3. Put tin foil over the pan.
4. Marinate ribs for 24 hours, flipping occasionally to ensure all ribs are marinated.
5. Take the ribs directly from the refrigerator and bake for 1 1/2 hours at 300°F, keeping the foil on.
